# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security


stages:
  - build
  - deploy-staging
  - deploy-production

variables:
  DEPLOYMENT_IMAGE: "alpine:latest"
  BUILD_IMAGE: "ubuntu:20.04"

build:
  stage: build
  image: $BUILD_IMAGE
  script:
    - echo "Building application..."
    - mkdir -p build/artifacts
    - echo "binary content" > build/artifacts/application
    - echo "config content" > build/artifacts/config.yaml
    - echo "version info" > build/artifacts/version.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/artifacts/
    expire_in: 30 days
    reports:
      junit: build/test-results.xml
  only:
    - main
    - develop

deploy-staging:
  stage: deploy-staging
  image: $DEPLOYMENT_IMAGE
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging environment..."
    - ls -la
    - chmod +x ./artifacts/application
    - ./artifacts/application --config ./artifacts/config.yaml
  dependencies:
    - build
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  only:
    - main

deploy-production:
  stage: deploy-production
  image: $DEPLOYMENT_IMAGE
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production environment..."
    - ls -la
    - chmod +x ./artifacts/application
    - ./artifacts/application --config ./artifacts/config.yaml
  dependencies:
    - build
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  only:
    - main
  when: manual
  allow_failure: false

security:
  stage: build
  image: $BUILD_IMAGE
  script:
    - echo "Running security checks..."
    - apt-get update && apt-get install -y yamllint
    - yamllint .gitlab-ci.yml
  artifacts:
    reports:
      trivy: trivy-report.json
  only:
    - main
    - develop

cache:
  key: "$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG"
  paths:
    - node_modules/
    - build/

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "web"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "schedule"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "trigger"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "api"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "external_pull_request_event"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "webhook"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "chat"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "manual"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "pipeline"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "schedule"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "webhook"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "trigger"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "api"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "external_pull_request_event"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "chat"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "manual"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "pipeline"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "schedule"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "webhook"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "trigger"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "api"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "external_pull_request_event"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "chat"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "manual"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "pipeline"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "schedule"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "webhook"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "trigger"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "api"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "external_pull_request_event"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "chat"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "manual"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "pipeline"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "schedule"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "webhook"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "trigger"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "api"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "external_pull_request_event"

    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"

    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "pipeline"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"

    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "api"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "external_pull_request_event"

    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "manual"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "pipeline"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push"

    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "webhook"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "trigger"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "api"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "external_pull_request_event"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "chat"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "manual"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "pipeline"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
